queries.query: SELECT * FROM HS_BILL_CUSTOMERS WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 1 ORDER BY FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME
INSERT INTO HS_BILL_CUSTOMERS (FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME, EMAIL, PHONE, ADDRESS) VALUES (@FirstName, @LastName, @Email, @Phone, @Address)
UPDATE HS_BILL_CUSTOMERS SET FIRST_NAME = @FirstName, LAST_NAME = @LastName, EMAIL = @Email, PHONE = @Phone, ADDRESS = @Address WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = @CustomerId
UPDATE HS_BILL_CUSTOMERS SET IS_ACTIVE = 0 WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = @CustomerId
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HS_BILL_INVOICES WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = @CustomerId
SELECT COUNT(1) AS TOTAL_ACTIVE_CUSTOMERS FROM HS_BILL_CUSTOMERS WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 1
